data.title: CooperCompanies Announces Release Date for Second Quarter 2026
data.description: Headquartered in San Ramon, California, on April 30, 2026, CooperCompanies (Nasdaq: COO), a prominent player in the medical device industry internationally, disclosed its plan to unveil the financial results for the second quarter of 2026 on Thursday, June 4, 2026, at 4:15 PM Eastern Time. Subsequent to this announcement, at 5:00 PM ET, the company is set to conduct a conference call to deliberate on the disclosed results and provide insights into current corporate advancements.

data.title: CubeSmart Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Malvern, Pennsylvania - On April 30, 2026, CubeSmart, a company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol CUBE, revealed its operational performance for the first quarter of the year ending March 31, 2026.

data.title: SHARC Energy Announces 2025 Year End Financial Results
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 30, 2026, SHARC International Systems Inc. (CSE: SHRC) (FSE: IWIA) (OTCQB: INTWF) ("SHARC Energy" or the “Company”) disclosed its financial report for the year ending December 31, 2025. The figures presented are in Canadian Dollars and comply with IFRS standards.

data.title: Alta Equipment Group Announces Date of First Quarter 2026 Financial Results Release, Conference Call and Webcast
data.description: Alta Equipment Group Inc., a top provider of premium material handling, construction, and environmental processing equipment, will disclose its financial results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2026, following the U.S. markets closing on May 7, 2026. Traded under the symbol ALTG on the NYSE, the Livonia-based company will have its conference call and webcast at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day to delve into the results and address queries. Before the event, Alta will release a press statement and accompanying presentation slides on its website's Investors section at https://investors.altaequipment.com.

data.title: Comstock Inc. to Host Q1 2026 Earnings Call and Business Update
data.description: Virginia City, Nevada - On April 30, 2026, Comstock Inc. (NYSE American: LODE) shared plans for CEO Corrado De Gasperis and CFO Judd Merrill to discuss the company's first quarter 2026 financial results and current business updates on May 7, 2026, at 4:30pm ET. The webinar will welcome investors and interested parties to register for the event, providing a platform for an overview.

data.title: Cue Biopharma Expands Pipeline with Exclusive License from Ascendant Health Sciences Ltd. for Clinical-Stage Dual-Mechanism Anti-IgE Antibody
data.description: A new dual-mechanism anti-IgE antibody has been developed with the aim of enhancing current treatments for IgE-mediated diseases. This novel antibody targets IgE, offering potential improvements over existing therapies. With a combination of mechanisms, it aims to provide more effective treatment options for individuals with IgE-mediated conditions. The antibody's unique design and approach could significantly impact the management of these diseases, potentially benefiting a significant number of patients worldwide.

data.title: Piedmont Realty Trust, Inc. Releases First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Atlanta, GA - Piedmont Realty Trust (NYSE: PDM) has disclosed its financial and operational performance for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2026. For detailed information, including the Earnings Release and Supplemental Information, investors can refer to the Investor Relations segment on Piedmont's official website - https://investor.piedmontreit.com.

data.title: Ryman Hospitality Properties, Inc. Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Nashville, Tennessee, on April 30, 2026, Ryman Hospitality Properties, Inc. (NYSE: RHP), a prominent lodging real estate investment trust focusing on group-oriented hotels in urban and resort areas, disclosed its financial performance for the quarter ending March 31, 2026.

data.title: SM ENERGY CLOSES $950 MILLION SOUTH TEXAS DIVESTITURE; ANNOUNCES REDEMPTION OF ALL OUTSTANDING 2026 SENIOR NOTES
data.description: SM Energy Company, listed as SM on the NYSE, has successfully closed a significant asset sale, indicating progress towards surpassing the $1.0 billion asset sale goal. The company's efforts to strengthen its financial position by bolstering the balance sheet have also been accelerated, with a particular focus on achieving this by 2026. This news reflects the strong momentum of SM Energy Company in achieving its strategic objectives and ensuring financial stability for the future.

data.title: SI-BONE To Present at BofA Securities 2026 Healthcare Conference on May 12, 2026
data.description: SI-BONE, Inc., a leading company in developing solutions for compromised bone issues, is set to take part in the 2026 BofA Securities Healthcare Conference in Las Vegas, NV. The event, scheduled for Tuesday, May 12, 2026, will feature a fireside chat by the company's management at 8:00 a.m. Pacific Time/11:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The company, listed on Nasdaq as SIBN, is known for its innovative procedural approaches to tackle clinical challenges related to bone health.

data.title: Safehold Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Safehold Inc. (NYSE: SAFE) released its first quarter 2026 results, with revenue reaching $110.9 million. The net income attributable to common shareholders for the same period was $28.9 million, translating to earnings per share of $0.40. During Q1'26, Safehold closed $68 million in new originations, including 3 ground leases amounting to $54 million and a leasehold loan for $14 million. Additionally, the company signed 1 Non-binding LOI, with 2 pending, totaling approximately $255 million. Safehold also saw its Estimated Unrealized Capital Appreciation rise to $9.5 billion. The company expressed satisfaction with its investment activity and UCA growth during the quarter. Further details can be found on Safehold Inc.'s official website.

data.title: Universal Display Corporation Announces $400 Million Share Repurchase Authorization and Quarterly Cash Dividend of $0.50 per Share
data.description: Ewing, New Jersey - Universal Display Corporation unveiled a plan for a $400 million share repurchase program and declared a cash dividend of $0.50 per share for the second quarter of 2026.

data.title: Zeta Global Revenue Growth Accelerates to 50% and “Beats and Raises” for Its 19th Consecutive Quarter on the Heels of the Athena by Zeta™ Launch
data.description: Zeta Global, based in New York, has shown significant growth with a 50% increase in revenue. This marks their 19th consecutive quarter of exceeding expectations and raising forecasts. The positive momentum follows the recent launch of Athena by Zeta™.

data.title: Grid Dynamics Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Grid Dynamics Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: GDYN), based in San Ramon, California, specializing in enterprise-level AI and digital transformation, has disclosed its performance for the quarter ending March 31, 2026. The company reported first quarter revenues totaling $104.1 million, surpassing the projected range of $103.0 million to $104.0 million. This marks a successful financial outcome for the company during this period.

data.title: Rivian Announces Optimized Capacity Plan for Georgia Plant
data.description: An automotive manufacturer Rivian has revealed plans to boost its annual production capacity to 300,000 vehicles at its upcoming facility in Stanton Springs North, Georgia. This marks a 50% rise from the original target of 200,000 units, aiming to drive down costs per unit and allow for potential expansion. The company expressed enthusiasm about this development.

data.title: Institutional adoption spurs $15+ LINK price prediction as whales go 69% long. $9.66 breakout may lead to 65% rally.
data.description: Whales currently hold 69% of the long positions in LINK, a cryptocurrency. The integration of institutional SWIFT is fueling adoption. LINK is on the verge of a crucial breakout at $9.66, which may lead to a 65% surge to $15. Following a 47% drop from its peak, the cryptocurrency is showing signs of recovery.

data.title: Price prediction for AVAX: Target set at $12 with institutional traders heavily favoring long positions at a 64% ratio.
data.description: AVAX is currently holding steady at $9.12 as institutional traders heavily favor long positions with a ratio of almost 2:1. Analysts predict that a potential breakout above $9.70 could spark a rally towards the resistance level of $12 and beyond.
